title: Preparation of Lung Tissue Blocks for MPLEx
author: Brittney Gorman
materials: Rapid-Core Sampling Punch - 4 mm Ted Pella Inc. Catalog #15115-10

steps.instruction: Place the sample in the cryostat (allow to thermally equilibrate ~20 min)
Cut 2x sections (50 μm) and place sections in pre-weighed 2 mL Sorenson MµlTI™ SafeSeal™ Microcentrifuge Tubes VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #53550
Set blade temperature -16 °C and specimen temperature of -14 °C
Place the sample in the cryostat (allow to thermally equilibrate ~30 min)
Set blade temperature -18 °C and specimen temperature of -16 °C

Use a Rapid-Core Sampling Punch - 4 mm Ted Pella Inc. Catalog #15115-10 to punch 2 tissue cores from each tissue section and place the punches in pre-weighed 2 mL Sorenson MµlTI™ SafeSeal™ Microcentrifuge Tubes VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #53550 *Note: When punching the tissue cores, avoid regions with OCT, as this can be difficult to remove from the sample and may yield contamination within the mass spectrum. Two 50 μm tissue sections after punching two 4 mm tissue cores
Weigh and Store at -80 °C until MPLEx sample preparation .
